---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...").

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope check

- [ ] I've checked [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) to see if this is already planned or deliberately deferred
- [ ] This touches `src/contracts/` or `src/lib/blockchain/` (if so, please describe the on-chain implications — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
